mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM PA_SUPERVISOR ps LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE he ON ps.PERSON_ID = he.PERSON_ID AND he.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT hd ON he.DEPTNO = hd.DEPTNO

SELECT PERSON_ID, EMP_ID, LOCAL_NAME, DEPT_NAME, EMP_OFFICE, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, ACTIVITY, ORDERNO FROM ( SELECT a.*, ROWNUM AS RN FROM ( SELECT ps.PERSON_ID, he.EMPID AS EMP_ID, he.LOCAL_NAME, hd.ORG_NAME_LOCAL AS DEPT_NAME, he.EMP_OFFICE, TO_CHAR(ps.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CREATE_DATE, get_emp_local_name(ps.CREATED_BY, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS CREATED_BY, ps.ACTIVITY, ps.ORDERNO FROM PA_SUPERVISOR ps LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE he ON ps.PERSON_ID = he.PERSON_ID AND he.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT hd ON he.DEPTNO = hd.DEPTNO
ORDER BY ps.ORDERNO ASC, ps.CREATE_DATE DESC ) a WHERE ROWNUM <= #{start, jdbcType=NUMERIC} + #{length, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ) WHERE RN > #{start, jdbcType=NUMERIC}

SELECT ps.PERSON_ID, he.EMPID AS EMP_ID, he.LOCAL_NAME, hd.ORG_NAME_LOCAL AS DEPT_NAME, he.EMP_OFFICE, TO_CHAR(ps.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CREATE_DATE, get_emp_local_name(ps.CREATED_BY, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS CREATED_BY, ps.ACTIVITY, ps.ORDERNO FROM PA_SUPERVISOR ps LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE he ON ps.PERSON_ID = he.PERSON_ID LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT hd ON he.DEPTNO = hd.DEPTNO WHERE ps.PERSON_ID = #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM PA_SUPERVISOR WHERE PERSON_ID = #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM PA_SUPERVISOR WHERE PERSON_ID = #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT ps.PERSON_ID, he.EMPID AS EMP_ID, he.LOCAL_NAME, hd.ORG_NAME_LOCAL AS DEPT_NAME, ps.ACTIVITY, ps.ORDERNO FROM PA_SUPERVISOR ps LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE he ON ps.PERSON_ID = he.PERSON_ID LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT hd ON he.DEPTNO = hd.DEPTNO WHERE ps.ACTIVITY = 1 ORDER BY ps.ORDERNO ASC, ps.CREATE_DATE DESC
SELECT DEPTNO AS "id", PARENT_DEPT_NO AS "parent", ORG_NAME_LOCAL AS "text" FROM HR_DEPARTMENT WHERE ACTIVITY = 1 ORDER BY ORDERNO ASC

SELECT d.DEPTNO AS "id", d.ORG_NAME_LOCAL AS "text", d.PARENT_DEPT_NO AS "parent" FROM HR_DEPARTMENT d INNER JOIN PA_SUPERVISOR_INFO si ON d.DEPTNO = si.DEPTNO WHERE d.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND si.PERSON_ID = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND d.ACTIVITY = 1 ORDER BY d.DEPT_LEVEL ASC, d.DEPTNO ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PA_SUPERVISOR_INFO ( PA_SUPERVISOR_NO, PERSON_ID, DEPTNO, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, ACTIVITY, ORDERNO ) VALUES ( #{paSupervisorNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{activity, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{orderNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM PA_SUPERVISOR_INFO WHERE PERSON_ID = #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
